ARBITRATOR PETER MALLON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-27-2004 THROUGH MAR-27-2005.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORKU, MEKONNEN AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, XUE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-27-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-18-2004

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORKU, MEKONNEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, XUE $5,457.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,457.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S)-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
